heading: LegislationLegalForceCode
text: A code identifying whether a law is in force, not in force, or partially in force.

heading: RoadLink
text: A Road Link is a type of Travelled Way Link that represents a length of Road.

heading: Gender
text: Gender is a type of Code that describes the gender identity of a person.

heading: PersonThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Person ontology.

heading: Program
text: A program is a major city initiative to address the needs of constituents (citizens, clients). A Program defines a set of services that focus on achieving a shared set of Outcomes.

heading: MainBylaw
text: A Main Bylaw is a legally enforceable rule that serves as the primary legislative document for a law within a Jurisdictional Area.

heading: Wage
text: A Wage is a form of compensation paid to an employee and is defined on an hourly basis.

heading: BusinessEstablishment
text: Business Establishment: A Business establishment is a physical location where an Organization conducts business.

heading: Output
text: Output is a quantitative summary of an activity.

heading: PersonId
text: Person ID is a type of City Thing that represents an identification document issued to a person by an authoritative body.

heading: LandUseThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Land Use ontology.

heading: Service
text: A Program is composed of one or more Services.

heading: Country
text: A Country is a specialization of a Jurisdictional Area that is formally identified as such.

heading: Citizenship
text: Citizenship is a type of City Thing that indicates the country of citizenship for a person during a specific period.

heading: CityResidentThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the City Resident ontology.

heading: PhoneNumber
text: A PhoneNumber defines the complete international phone number and type of number.

heading: Organization
text: An Organization defined broadly as a formal or semi-formal group for which structure and behaviour are defined.

heading: Tunnel
text: A Tunnel is a Infrastructure Element that enables travel through or underneath some obstacle or area. It may contain some Road or RailLine Segments.

heading: Warranty
text: A Warranty is a contractual promise of some indemnification if an assertion made in the Contract is false.

heading: Alert
text: An Alert can be used to notify people of important information.

heading: NonBindingTerm
text: A NonBindingTerm is a term in a contract that does not have legal force.

heading: CatchmentAreaType
text: Catchment Area Type is a type of Code that describes the type of catchment area that stakeholders represent

heading: CityResident
text: A City Resident is a Person who satisfies the requirements of being a city resident for the particular City.

heading: LandUseClassification
text: Land Use Classification is a type of Code that describes the use of a Land Area.

heading: Law
text: A Law is an legally enforceable rule.

heading: PhoneType
text: A PhoneType defines the type of phone number.

heading: Person
text: A Person is an individual human being.

heading: BuildingThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Building ontology.

heading: Contract
text: A contract is a legally binding agreement between two or more parties.

heading: Education
text: Education is a type of Code that describes the educational background of a person.

heading: CodeThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Code ontology.

heading: AlertThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined for the Alert Pattern.

heading: ConstructionStatus
text: Construction Status is a type of Code that describes the construction status of a Building or Infrastructure Element.

heading: ResidentialRelationship
text: A ResidentialRelationship defines the relationship of a Resident to a Residence.

heading: Definition
text: A definition is a statement that explains the meaning of a term or concept as used within the domain object (e.g., a document).

heading: HomeType
text: Home Type is a type of Code that describes the type of a Residence.

heading: ContractThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Contract ontology.

heading: Role
text: A Role has a single, possibly complex, Goal.

heading: Bylaw
text: A bylaw is a law that is passed by a lower hierarchical entity that gains its authority from a government authority.

heading: ContractualDefinition
text: A contractual definition is a definition of a term used within a contract.

heading: CityAdministrativeArea
text: Jurisdictional Area that has been identified for use by a City to reflect its unique areas such as districts, wards, neighbourhoods, or prefectures.

heading: Importance
text: Importance is a type of Code that describes the level of importance of an event or action.

heading: ControlledEntity
text: A controlled entity is an entity that is subject to control by another entity.

heading: City
text: A City is a specialization of a Jurisdictional Area that is formally identified as such.

heading: AddressType
text: Address Type is a type of Code that describes the type of address, such as residential, business, or mailing.

heading: StreetDirection
text: A StreetDirection defines the directional component of a street name.

heading: Facility
text: A facility is a physical location or structure that provides services or amenities to the public or a specific group of people.

heading: RailLine
text: A Rail Line is a type of Travelled Way that describes a part of the physical transportation infrastructure that has been fitted with tracks to allow travel by trains and other sorts of rail vehicles. No distinction is made between Rail Line types at this level.

heading: EmploymentStatus
text: Employment Status is a type of Code that describes the employment status of an Agent within an Organization.

heading: ContractualElement
text: A contractual element is an element that forms part of a contract, such as a definition, condition, or commitment.

heading: OrganizationAgent
text: Member of an organization

heading: Name
text: A Name represents a formal name given to an entity and is a superclass for all more descriptive name types.

heading: Skill
text: Skill is a type of Code that describes a specific ability or competency of a person.

heading: AmendingBylaw
text: An Amending Bylaw is a type of Bylaw that modifies or updates an existing bylaw.

heading: Household
text: A Household refers to a collection of persons occupying a shared place of residence. Households may or may not be comprised of family members.

heading: EntityOperation
text: Activity of operating an Organization by City Resident.

heading: RailSegment
text: A Rail Segment is a type of Travelled Way Segment that represents part of a Rail Link.

heading: LandArea
text: A Land Area is a defined geographic area of land.

heading: BuildingUse
text: Building Use is a type of Code that describes the use or function of a Building

heading: Input
text: Input defines the resources and the stakeholders that are needed for an Activity.

heading: CityThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined for the city-level CDM ontology.

heading: Building
text: A Building is a type of Infrastructure Element that is a structure with a roof and walls, such as a house, school, or factory. The location of a Building may change due to construction, but the Parcel/Lot of land it is located on cannot (i.e., moving an entire building results in a change in object instance).

heading: TransportInfrastructureThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Transport Infrastructure Pattern ontology.

heading: Schedule
text: A Schedule is a component of a bylaw that outlines specific provisions, terms, or details related to the main content of the document.

heading: RevisionBylaw
text: A RevisionBylaw is a bylaw that amends an existing bylaw.

heading: IDType
text: ID Type is a type of Code that describes the type of identification document issued to a person.

heading: BylawTypeCode
text: A code identifying whether a bylaw is a main, amending, or revision bylaw.

heading: TravelledWayLink
text: A Travelled Way Link represents a continuous length of a Travelled Way and is a type of Infrastructure Element that connects two or more Travelled Way Segments.

heading: Clause
text: A Clause is a statement of a rule, provision, requirement, etc. that is part of the body of the Law, or its schedules, penalties, etc.

heading: HouseholdThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Household ontology.

heading: CityPatternThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the City Services part of the City Data Model.

heading: ForProfitOrganization
text: A for-profit organization is an organization that operates with the primary goal of generating profit for its owners or shareholders.

heading: StreetType
text: A StreetType defines the type of street.

heading: Code
text: A code represents a possible set of values for a property, according to some predefined system of values.

heading: Representation
text: Part of the Contract that specifies some assertions that are taken to be true at the time of the contract and serve to influence a party's decision to enter into the Contract.

heading: BuildingUnit
text: A part of a Building which may be occupied by some Persons or Organization.

heading: RoadSegment
text: A Road Segment is a type of Travelled Way Segment that represents part of a Road Link.

heading: Address
text: Address is the main concept for a contact.  It has been designed to represent any type of address in the world, including India and the UK.  For example, the property hasBuilding is important in many UK and Indian addresses to further identify the person or business location. Street information is divided into separate properties to fully identify direction (hasStreetDirection), Type (hasStreetType), etc.

heading: Bridge
text: A Bridge is a Infrastructure Element that enables travel over some obstacle or area. It may contain some Road Segments or Rail Line Segments.

heading: ContractualCommitment
text: A contractual commitment is a legally binding part of a contract that consists of a promise made by a party in relation to the contract.

heading: BylawThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Bylaw ontology.

heading: Sex
text: Sex is a type of Code that describes the biological sex of a person.

heading: Year
text: Represents a year in the Gregorian calendar.

heading: RailLink
text: A Rail Link is a type of Travelled Way Link that represents a length of RailLine.

heading: Operation
text: An Operation defines the regular opening hours of an Organization or Infrastructure Element.

heading: Occupation
text: Occupation describes the work performed by some Employee.

heading: InfrastructureThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Infrastructure pattern.

heading: Employment
text: Employment is a type of Organizational membership in which the Agent receives monetary compensation for the value that they provide to the Organization.

heading: ImpactDirection
text: Impact Direction is a type of Code that describes the direction of impact of an event or action.

heading: CityServiceThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the City Service ontology.

heading: NonProfitOrganization
text: A NonProfitOrganization is an non-governmental organization that operates for purposes other than generating profit.

heading: State
text: A State is a political subdivision of a country.

heading: CityOrgThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the City Organization ontology.

heading: EntityOwnership
text: Activity of owning a Building, Land Area, or Organization by City Resident.

heading: IndustryType
text: Industry Type is a type of Code that describes the industry sector of a business establishment.

heading: Stakeholder
text: A Stakeholder is an Organization or Person that has an interest in a Program or Service.

heading: ConditionPrecedent
text: A condition precedent is a condition that must be met before a contract becomes effective.

heading: Goal
text: A goal represents some state or complex states, and allows for the representation of various groups' responsibilities.

heading: Salary
text: A Salary is a form of compensation paid to an employee and is defined on an annual basis.

heading: ContactThing
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify classes defined in the Contact ontology.

heading: TravelledWaySegment
text: A Travelled Way Segment is a type of Infrastructure Element that represents part of a Travelled Way Link.

heading: TravelledWay
text: A Travelled Way is a type of Infrastructure Element that enables travel.

heading: JurisdictionalArea
text: A Jurisdictional Area is an abstract entity that is characterized not only by its location, but by the objects that occupy it (persons, buildings, etc), the governing body(s) it is subject to, and the activities that occur within it.

heading: TunnelSegment
text: A Tunnel Segment is a type of Infrastructure Element that represents part of a Tunnel.

heading: Compensation
text: A compensation is a generalization of monetary compensation received for employment.

heading: InfrastructureElement
text: An Infrastructure Element is a generic representation of a city structure of interest.

heading: Road
text: A Road is a type of Travelled Way that describes a part of the physical transport infrastructure that has been improved to allow travel by motor vehicles, persons, bicycles, or similar methods of conveyance. road vehicles. No distinction is made between Road types at this level.

heading: Outcome
text: Outcomes are what stakeholders experience as a result of a Program or Service.

heading: CityOrgObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the City Organization Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: annualPay
text: Identifies the compensation to be paid for a year.

heading: employedAs
text: Identifies the occupation in which the agent is employed.

heading: employedBy
text: Identifies the Organization that employs the agent.

heading: hasCompensation
text: identifies the monetary compensation received by the agent.

heading: hasEmployment
text: Specifies the details of an agent’s Employment.

heading: hasEmploymentStatus
text: identifies the Employment Status of the employee.

heading: hasEstablishment
text: Specifies a Business Establishment where the organization conducts business.

heading: hasGoal
text: identifies the Goal(s) of the domain object.

heading: hasGovernment
text: Identifies the GovernmentOrganization that manages the JurisdictionalArea.

heading: hasIndustryType
text: Specifies an Industry Type assigned to the organization based on the kind of business conducted.

heading: hasPay
text: Identifies the MonetaryValue of the Compensation.

heading: hasProcess
text: Specifies an Activity that is performed as part of the Role.

heading: hasProgram
text: Specifies a Program defined for the Organization.

heading: hasResource
text: Specifies a resource:Resource that is (expected to be) allocated for the Role.

heading: hourlyPay
text: Identifies the Compensation to be paid per hour.

heading: jurisdiction
text: Specifies the JurisdictionalArea for which the organization is responsible.

heading: operatingHours
text: Identifies the OperatingHours of the Organization.

heading: orgAddress
text: A specialization to hasAddress that specifies the Address associated with the Organization.

heading: overtimePay
text: Identifies an additional rate of pay as a MonetaryValue to be paid per hour in the case of overtime compensation.

heading: playsRole
text: Specifies a Role that the domain object fulfils.

heading: PersonObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Person Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: alias
text: Identifies any alternative names associated with a Person.

heading: birthDate
text: Identifies the time:Instant when the Person was born.

heading: birthplace
text: Identifies the place where the Person was born.

heading: children
text: Identifies any children of a person.

heading: citizenOf
text: specifies one or more Citizenships, each specifying the country (Country) and time interval (time:ProperInterval) the Person is a citizen. A Person can be a citizen of more than one country and for different time intervals. It is recommended that a Country be defined with using ISO 3166-2 [4] alpha-2 (2-letter) country code, however different systems may be accommodated with the Code pattern.

heading: deathDate
text: Identifies the time:Instant when the Person died.

heading: deathPlace
text: Identifies the place where the Person died.

heading: forCountry
text: Identifies the country for which the Person is a citizen for the given dates.

heading: hasEducation
text: Identifies the education of a person.

heading: hasGenderIdentity
text: Identifies the gender identity of a person.

heading: hasIDType
text: Specifies the type of identifier, its values may be defined more precisely with the use of the code:hasCode property.

heading: hasPersonID
text: Identifies any instances of a Person’s PersonId.

heading: hasSkill
text: Identifies the skills of a person.

heading: income
text: Identifies the annual income of a person.

heading: issuedBy
text: Identifies the Agent that issued the ID, document, or certificate.

heading: name
text: Identifies the instance of Name legally associated with an Object (e.g., Person).

heading: parent
text: Identifies any parents of the Person.

heading: sex
text: Identifies a Person's sex assigned at birth.

heading: spouse
text: Identifies any spouses of the person.

heading: validityPeriod
text: Identifies the time interval during which the identifier is valid.

heading: CityObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for city-level CDM ontology.

heading: CodeObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Code Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: definedBy
text: Identifies the Organization that defined the Code.

heading: hasCode
text: Identifies the code for the domain object.

heading: LandUseObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined in the Land Use ontology.

heading: hasArea
text: identifies the size of a Land Area

heading: hasLandArea
text: Identifies the spatial area occupied by the object.

heading: hasPopulation
text: Specifies the number of people living in the LandArea.

heading: landUse
text: Identifies a Land Use Classification that is identified for the Land Area.

heading: TransportInfrastructureObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Transport Infrastructure Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: networkType
text: Identifies the type of network.

heading: supports
text: Identifies the infrastructure element that is supported (carried in or carried through) the current (domain) object.

heading: CityPatternObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: administrativeArea
text: Identifies administrative areas within the JurisdictionalArea.

heading: administrativeAreaOf
text: Identifies the jurisdictional area that an administrative area belongs to.

heading: residentPopulation
text: Number of residents of the area.

heading: BuildingObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Building Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: buildingFacility
text: Identifies a Facility that is contained in the Building.

heading: floorAreaRatio
text: Identifies the building's floor area ratio. This is a ratio of the gross floor area (the value of hasBuildingFloorArea) to its “buildable area” (i.e. lot size).

heading: floorToCeilingHeight
text: Identifies the floor to ceiling height in the Building Unit.

heading: hasBuildingFloorArea
text: identifies the floor area occupied by the Building. The floor area accounts for the area of each floor of the building. However, floor area excludes unoccupied areas such as basements.

heading: hasBuildingFootprintArea
text: Identifies the footprint occupied by the Building.

heading: hasBuildingHeight
text: Identifies the Building’s height.

heading: hasBuildingUnit
text: Identifies the Building Unit(s), if any, that are contained by the Building.

heading: hasConstructionStatus
text: identifies the Construction Status of a Building.

heading: hasRent
text: Identifies the rental fee for the Building Unit.

heading: hasUnitSize
text: Identifies the size of the Building Unit as an Area.

heading: unitInBuilding
text: Identifies the Building that the Building Unit belongs to (is contained in).

heading: use
text: Identifies the use of the Building, typically associated with some classification system.

heading: windowToWallRatio
text: Identifies the percentage area of a building’s exterior envelope that is made up of glazing (i.e., glass installed in fixed openings such as windows and doors).

heading: yearOfConstruction
text: Identifies the year that construction on the Building was completed.

heading: ContractObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Contract Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: hasContract
text: Identifies the Contract associated with the domain object.

heading: hasContractualElement
text: Identifies the decomposition of a Contract into more precise parts.

heading: contractualElementOf
text: Identifies the Contract of which this Contractual Element is a part.

heading: hasParty
text: Identifies all Persons or Organizations involved in the Contract.

heading: hasSignatory
text: identifies the Person(s) responsible for signing the Contract.

heading: isExecutedOn
text: identifies the Interval or Instant in time at which the terms in the Contract are executed, if applicable.

heading: isValidFor
text: Identifies the Interval in time over which the domain object is valid.

heading: specifiesAgreement
text: Identifies an agreement that is specified by the domain object.

heading: CityServiceObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the City Service Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: fromPerspectiveOf
text: Identifies the Stakeholder who is determining the importance of the Impact.

heading: hasBeneficialStakeholder
text: Identifies the Stakeholder who is benefiting from the object.

heading: hasCatchmentArea
text: Identifies the regional span of the stakeholders.

heading: hasCatchmentAreaType
text: Identifies the type of regional span of the stakeholders.

heading: hasContributingStakeholder
text: Identifies the stakeholders that contribute to the domain object.

heading: hasImportance
text: Specifies how important the Outcome is.

heading: hasIndicator
text: identifies an Indicator used to measure to the Outcome.

heading: hasInput
text: Identifies an input used in the domain object.

heading: hasOutcome
text: Identifies the Outcomes or expected Outcomes of the domain object.

heading: hasOutput
text: Identifies an output produced by the domain object.

heading: hasService
text: Identifies the Services that make up the domain object.

heading: intendedImpact
text: identifies the intended impact.

heading: performs
text: Identifies activities performed by the domain object.

heading: usedByIndicator
text: Identifies the Indicators that use this Output in determining the value of the Indicator.

heading: AlertObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify all object properties defined in the Alert Pattern.

heading: activities
text: activities that caused the described object

heading: beginInstant
text: The time that the described object began or is expected to begin. If not specified, the object is assumed to begin at the creation time.

heading: category
text: A code indicating the category of the described object.

heading: cause
text: A code indicating the cause (e.g., construction, collision, weather) of the described object.

heading: certainty
text: The likelihood of the condition occurring.

heading: creationInstant
text: The time that the described object was created.

heading: distribution
text: A code indicating the groups who are authorized to receive the object.

heading: effect
text: A code indicating the effect of the alert (e.g., congestion, delays).

heading: endInstant
text: The time that the described object is expected to end; if no end time is specified, it is assumed to be indeterminate.

heading: expiryInstant
text: The time at which the information for the described object is considered no longer valid unless this value is updated.

heading: issuer
text: Entity that issued the alert

heading: lastUpdateInstant
text: The time at which the alert was last updated.

heading: location
text: A geographic area associated with the alert.

heading: recommendation
text: A code providing advice on actions to take (e.g., evacuate, shelter in-place).

heading: referencedAlert
text: Other alerts associated with this alert.

heading: resources
text: additional files that provide additional information

heading: severity
text: A code indicating the expected severity of the condition (e.g., life threatening, injury potential).

heading: status
text: The operational status.

heading: urgency
text: The urgency associated with distributing the alert.

heading: AddressProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify properties related to an address.

heading: ContactObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Contact Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: hasAddress
text: Specifies the address of the object.

heading: hasAddressType
text: specifies the type of address.

heading: hasCity
text: Specifies the name of the city for the address.

heading: hasCountry
text: Specifies the country for the address.

heading: hasPhoneType
text: Specifies the type of phone number.

heading: hasProvince
text: Specifies the state or province for the address.

heading: hasStreetDirection
text: Specifies the direction of the street for the address.

heading: hasStreetType
text: specifies the type of the street for the address.

heading: hasTelephone
text: Identifies the PhoneNumber for the domain object.

heading: BylawObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for bylaws in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: clauseType
text: A Code indicating a clause type of a clause within a Law or similar official document.

heading: hasBylaw
text: Identifies the bylaws in existence in the JurisdictionalArea.

heading: hasClause
text: Clauses that make up the body of the domain object.

heading: hasDefinition
text: Words or phrases that are defined to have a specific meaning within the domain object.

heading: hasPenaltyClause
text: Identifies the Clauses that specify penalties for not adhering to the domain object.

heading: hasRepealClause
text: Clauses that specify all previous Laws that deal with subjects that are addressed in the new bylaw must either be repealed or amended.

heading: hasSchedule
text: Schedules that are attached to the Law and are referenced by the Law. A Schedule is part of the Law.

heading: hasSeveranceClause
text: Clauses that specify that the bylaw remains valid if any portion of the Law is found to be invalid by a higher jurisdiction.

heading: hasTransitionClause
text: Clauses that cover the period during which entities affected by the Law can do things to conform to the new conditions.

heading: impacts
text: Identifies what is impacted by the domain object.

heading: legislationChanges
text: The Bylaw that is being amended.

heading: legislationJurisdiction
text: Identifies the jurisdiction that enacted the Law.

heading: legislationLegalForce
text: Specifies whether the Law is currently in force, not in force or partially in force.

heading: legislationType
text: Type of bylaw chosen from mainBylaw, amendingBylaw or revisionBylaw.

heading: CityResidentObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the City Resident Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: entity
text: Identifies an entity that is the subject domain object.

heading: forCity
text: Identifies the City of the residence.

heading: hasHomeType
text: Identifies the type of home.

heading: hasResidence
text: Specifies a Residence of a CityResident.

heading: hasResidentialRelationship
text: Specifies the type of residential relationship that exists.

heading: operates
text: Specifies an EntityOperation where the entity is an Organization that the resident operates.

heading: owns
text: Identifies an entity that is owned by another entity.

heading: residentOf
text: Identifies the JurisdictionalArea that a CityResident is a resident.

heading: HouseholdObjectProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify object properties defined for the Household Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: householdOccupies
text: Identifies the Residence that the Household occupies. A Household is defined by this residence, such that if the members move (even collectively), the new residence constitutes a new Household.

heading: CityOrgDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined for the City Organization Pattern in the City-level CDM ontology.

heading: hasOpeningTime
text: Specifies the opening time for the domain object.

heading: PersonDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the Person Pattern.

heading: additionalName
text: Identifies a string that is the middle or additional names of the Person.

heading: familyName
text: Identifies as single string that is the family or last name of the Person.

heading: givenName
text: Identifies a string that is the given or first name of the Person.

heading: photoID
text: Specifies whether the identifier contains a photo.

heading: CityDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined for city-level CDM ontology.

heading: CodeDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the City Code Pattern.

heading: specification
text: Provides a URI where the definition of the domain object can be found.

heading: CityPatternDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the City-level ontology.

heading: legalName
text: Identifies the legal name of the domain object.

heading: BuildingDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the Building Pattern.

heading: builtAccordingToConstructionCode
text: Identifies the name of any construction code(s) applicable during the construction of the Building.

heading: numAboveGroundFloors
text: Specifies the number of above-ground floors in a building, including the ground floor.

heading: numBuildingUnits
text: Specifies the total number of building units in a building.

heading: numFloors
text: Identifies the total number of floors in a building (including those below ground).

heading: numberOfBedrooms
text: Specifies the number of bedrooms in a building unit.

heading: numberOfRooms
text: Specifies the number of rooms in a building unit.

heading: propertyRegistrationID
text: Identifies the unique identifier of the real estate in the property register of authority where the Building is located.

heading: ContractDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the Contract Pattern.

heading: hasContractText
text: Identifies the excerpt of text from the Contract that corresponds to the Contractual Element.

heading: AlertDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify all data properties defined in the Alert Pattern.

heading: headline
text: short textual caption

heading: website
text: URI that identifies a website

heading: AddressDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined for addresses in the contact pattern.

heading: ContactDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the contact pattern.

heading: TelephoneDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined for telephone numbers in the Contact Pattern.

heading: buildingName
text: Specifies the name of the building for the Address.

heading: hasAreaCode
text: Specifies the area code for the PhoneNumber.

heading: hasCitySection
text: Specifies the section of the city for the Address.

heading: hasCountryCode
text: Identifies the country code for the telephone number.

heading: hasEmail
text: Identifies an email address of the organization or individual.

heading: hasPhoneNumber
text: Specifies the remaining digits of the number after the area code.

heading: hasPostalBox
text: sSecifies the box number for the address.

heading: hasPostalCode
text: Specifies the zip or postalcode for the address.

heading: hasStreet
text: Specifies the street name for the address.

heading: hasStreetNumber
text: Specifies the street number for the address.

heading: hasUnitNumber
text: Specifies the unit or suite number for the address.

heading: maxStreetNumber
text: specifies the maximum street number of an street number range, in the case that it is defined with a street number range.

heading: minStreetNumber

heading: BylawDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the Bylaw Pattern.

heading: abstract
text: Specifies a brief statement describing the purpose of the domain object.

heading: dateInEffect
text: Date after which the domain object is in effect.

heading: datePublished
text: Date the domain object is officially published.

heading: expires
text: Date the domain object expires.

heading: keywords
text: Identifies keywords used to categorize the domain object for search purposes.

heading: legislationDate
text: Date on which the Law is officially adopted/signed by the Jurisdiction.

heading: legislationIdentifier
text: Identifies a unique identifier of the law.

heading: CityResidentDataProperty
text: Added for organizational purposes, to identify data properties defined in the City Resident Pattern.

heading: percentOwnership
text: Specifies the percentage of ownership that an entity has in another entity.
